title: Report pull/commit progress by default
body: Have `from`, `commit`, and `build-using-dockerfile` report progress via stderr (so that capturing output from `from` and `commit` still works as expected) unless `--quiet` is used to suppress the reporting.  Should fix #94.

comments.body: ![](https://github.trello.services/images/mini-trello-icon.png) [[buildah] Report progress when pulling or committing images, like skopeo does](https://trello.com/c/vVLoq3On/479-buildah-report-progress-when-pulling-or-committing-images-like-skopeo-does)
Need changes to man pages and bash completions.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 6d03588) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Okay, man pages and completions should be up to date.
